title: ReplicaSet — Terminating Pods
text:
You can enable this feature by setting the
DeploymentReplicaSetTerminatingReplicas
feature gate
on the
API server
and on the
kube-controller-manager
Pods that become terminating due to deletion or scale down may take a long time to terminate, and may consume
additional resources during that period. As a result, the total number of all pods can temporarily exceed
.spec.replicas
. Terminating pods can be tracked using the
.status.terminatingReplicas
field of the ReplicaSet.
